name: Aloha Pineapple and Banana
recipeIngredient: 20 ounces pineapple rings in juice, drained (10)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange pineapple slices on a greased baking sheet.
2. Place a banana slice in the center of each pineapple slice.
3. Sprinkle with lemon juice and half of the cinnamon-sugar mixture.
4. Prepare the meringue by combining egg whites, cream of tartar, and sugar until stiff peaks form.
5. Spread the meringue evenly over each pineapple slice.
6. Sprinkle remaining cinnamon-sugar over the meringue.
7. Bake at 400°F for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
8. Garnish with halved cherries.
9. Serve warm or cold.
